title: 2024 7(j) Distribution
summary: Koniag’s Class B Shareholders will receive a distribution of $6.33 per share on June 26, 2024. Please note the key dates for this distribution: June 5, 2024 The last day to change names, gift stock, process estates, or transfer shares. title: Tribe seeks feedback on future charter school
summary: The Kenaitze Indian Tribe is seeking feedback from the community regarding its plans to open a charter school for the 2025-26 school year. To complete a Community Interest Survey, go to https://bit.ly/KenaitzeSchoolSurvey . Surveys can also be mailed, emailed, or picked up at the Kahtnuht’ana Duhdel...

title: Rie Muñoz
summary: It’s hard to walk into an Alaskan home without encountering a Rie Muñoz painting. A self-taught artist with an easy laugh, this Dutch-American found her way into the heart of the 49th state. The post Rie Muñoz appeared first on Alaska Magazine .

title: Petersburg volunteer firefighter receives long-delayed state award
summary: Petersburg Volunteer Fire Department Captain Dan Bird (left) accepts the 2023 Ken Akerley Fire Service Leadership Award from Asssistant State Fire Marshal Mark Brauneis (right) on May 6, 2024.
